description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ada-examples that triggers on push to any branch in ada/* paths, on pull requests to any branch in ada/* paths, and on workflow dispatch. Run two jobs: one with a matrix of windows-latest and macos-latest OS, and another on macos-13. For each job, check out the repository, set up Alire with the nightly version, install the toolchain, and build the Ada project in the ada directory.
